title: ABA Journal: Will US Immigration Policies Create ‘Chilling Effect’ on World Cup? | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

US visa appointment backlogs and visa processing constraints are shaping international travel planning for the upcoming World Cup. In an article published in ABA Journal , Partner Daniel Schwarz notes that in some countries B visa interview appointments can be booked months and months in advance, limiting timely access for travelers. He also highlights the FIFA Priority Appointment Scheduling System, which allows eligible World Cup ticket holders to secure earlier visa interview appointments ahead of the tournament.
Read more here ( please note a subscription may be required to access this article ).
